title: 48-hour integration accounts retain at 2.3x the 90-day rate
anchor: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration within 48 hours of kickoff.
connect: Accounts that integrated after the first week showed baseline 90-day retention.
body: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration within 48 hours of kickoff. Accounts that integrated after the first week showed baseline 90-day retention.
trace: Strong retention correlation with early integration speed across Q1 cohort of 47 implementations.

title: Mid-market implementations cleared go-live 6 days ahead of plan
anchor: 22 mid-market implementations in Q1 averaged Day 45 kickoff-to-go-live versus the Day 51 baseline.
connect: Healthcare vertical ran the fastest segment median at 38 days across 11 go-lives.
body: 22 mid-market implementations in Q1 averaged Day 45 kickoff-to-go-live versus the Day 51 baseline. Healthcare vertical ran the fastest segment median at 38 days across 11 go-lives.
trace: Mid-market delivery execution outpaced project plan baseline by meaningful margin this quarter.

title: Tier-2 activation reached 78% inside 14 days this quarter
anchor: The mid-complexity tier crossed first value at 78% versus Q4's 54% rate.
connect: Tier-1 implementations hit 81% activation after the self-serve sandbox launched March 12.
body: The mid-complexity tier crossed first value at 78% versus Q4's 54% rate. Tier-1 implementations hit 81% activation after the self-serve sandbox launched March 12.
trace: Activation improvements across complexity tiers with different drivers — template for Tier-2, sandbox for Tier-1.

title: 3-user activation by Day 30 drives 3x stronger retention
anchor: 31 of 47 Q1 implementations crossed the multi-user threshold in the first month.
connect: Single-user activations showed baseline retention at the 90-day mark.
body: 31 of 47 Q1 implementations crossed the multi-user threshold in the first month. Single-user activations showed baseline retention at the 90-day mark.
trace: Multi-stakeholder engagement in the first 30 days correlates with stronger long-term retention outcomes.

title: Configuration template moved enterprise sign-off to Day 11
anchor: 14 enterprise implementations this quarter cleared configuration review at a Day 11 median.
connect: The prior baseline ran at Day 18 before the pre-kickoff template launched March 1.
body: 14 enterprise implementations this quarter cleared configuration review at a Day 11 median. The prior baseline ran at Day 18 before the pre-kickoff template launched March 1.
trace: Pre-kickoff configuration template compressed the enterprise configuration review cycle by 7 days.

title: Data integration milestone completion sits at 71% within 10 days
anchor: 38 active implementations this quarter cleared the integration milestone at 71% versus Q4's 58%.
connect: Healthcare accounts ran the fastest go-live median at 38 days across 11 implementations.
body: 38 active implementations this quarter cleared the integration milestone at 71% versus Q4's 58%. Healthcare accounts ran the fastest go-live median at 38 days across 11 implementations.
trace: Integration milestone execution improved quarter-over-quarter with healthcare showing fastest completion patterns.

title: Onboarding checklist completion rose to 34% after template launch
anchor: Checklist completion moved from 22% to 34% following the March 1 configuration template.
connect: The UserGuiding industry baseline sits at 19.2% for checklist completion.
body: Checklist completion moved from 22% to 34% following the March 1 configuration template. The UserGuiding industry baseline sits at 19.2% for checklist completion.
trace: Configuration template launch correlated with meaningful increase in onboarding checklist engagement.

title: Kickoff stakeholder breadth reached 64% with 3-plus named contacts
anchor: 51 kickoffs this quarter listed 3 or more stakeholders on the project plan at 64%.
connect: The prior quarter ran at 39% for multi-stakeholder kickoff coverage.
body: 51 kickoffs this quarter listed 3 or more stakeholders on the project plan at 64%. The prior quarter ran at 39% for multi-stakeholder kickoff coverage.
trace: Stakeholder identification and engagement at kickoff improved significantly quarter-over-quarter.

title: Complete use-case capture shortened go-live cycles by 12 days
anchor: 34 Q1 implementations with pre-close documentation reached go-live 12 days earlier.
connect: Implementations without complete use-case capture ran the baseline cycle length.
body: 34 Q1 implementations with pre-close documentation reached go-live 12 days earlier. Implementations without complete use-case capture ran the baseline cycle length.
trace: Sales-to-implementation handoff quality directly correlates with implementation cycle compression.

title: Mid-market implementation NPS jumped 18 points to 59
anchor: 28 surveyed mid-market go-lives this quarter scored 59 NPS versus the prior 41.
connect: The 18-point lift represents the largest segment-level NPS movement on record.
body: 28 surveyed mid-market go-lives this quarter scored 59 NPS versus the prior 41. The 18-point lift represents the largest segment-level NPS movement on record.
trace: Mid-market implementation experience improvement produced record NPS lift for the segment.

title: Product-blocker resolution tightened from 9 days to 4 days
anchor: 17 implementation-tagged Engineering issues this quarter resolved at a 4-day median.
connect: The prior quarter median ran at 9 days for the same issue category.
body: 17 implementation-tagged Engineering issues this quarter resolved at a 4-day median. The prior quarter median ran at 9 days for the same issue category.
trace: Engineering response velocity on implementation-specific product issues improved by more than half.

title: Self-serve sandbox lifted Tier-1 activation 19 percentage points
anchor: Tier-1 implementations reached first value at 81% after the March 12 sandbox launch.
connect: The pre-launch rate ran at 62% across 36 Tier-1 accounts.
body: Tier-1 implementations reached first value at 81% after the March 12 sandbox launch. The pre-launch rate ran at 62% across 36 Tier-1 accounts.
trace: Self-serve sandbox enabled pre-kickoff exploration and produced significant Tier-1 activation improvement.

title: Enterprise handoff briefs acknowledged within 48 hours at 92%
anchor: 26 enterprise go-lives had structured handoff briefs acknowledged by CSMs at 92%.
connect: The 48-hour acknowledgment window became the standard this quarter.
body: 26 enterprise go-lives had structured handoff briefs acknowledged by CSMs at 92%. The 48-hour acknowledgment window became the standard this quarter.
trace: Implementation-to-CSM handoff brief process achieving high acknowledgment rates within defined window.

title: Implementation support response compressed to 2.4 hours median
anchor: 142 implementation-tagged support tickets this quarter saw first response at 2.4 hours.
connect: The dedicated implementation queue launched this quarter versus the prior 6-hour median.
body: 142 implementation-tagged support tickets this quarter saw first response at 2.4 hours. The dedicated implementation queue launched this quarter versus the prior 6-hour median.
trace: Dedicated implementation support queue compressed first-response time by more than half.

title: Healthcare vertical implementations run 13 days faster than portfolio median
anchor: 11 healthcare go-lives averaged 38 days kickoff-to-go-live this quarter.
connect: The portfolio median across all segments sits at 51 days planned baseline.
body: 11 healthcare go-lives averaged 38 days kickoff-to-go-live this quarter. The portfolio median across all segments sits at 51 days planned baseline.
trace: Healthcare vertical shows consistently fastest implementation cycles with predictable configuration patterns.

title: Configuration template launch correlates with activation and completion gains
anchor: March 1 template launch preceded the Tier-2 activation jump to 78% and checklist completion to 34%.
connect: Enterprise configuration sign-off compressed to Day 11 over the same window.
body: March 1 template launch preceded the Tier-2 activation jump to 78% and checklist completion to 34%. Enterprise configuration sign-off compressed to Day 11 over the same window.
trace: Single product change (configuration template) produced measurable improvements across multiple implementation metrics.

title: Early integration speed separates high-retention implementations
anchor: First-week integration connected in 26 of 47 Q1 implementations at the 48-hour mark.
connect: The 2.3x retention correlation appears in the 90-day cohort data.
body: First-week integration connected in 26 of 47 Q1 implementations at the 48-hour mark. The 2.3x retention correlation appears in the 90-day cohort data.
trace: Integration timing within the first 48 hours strongly predicts long-term account retention outcomes.

title: Multi-stakeholder kickoffs expanded from 39% to 64% this quarter
anchor: 51 kickoffs listed 3-plus stakeholders at 64% versus the prior quarter's 39%.
connect: Multi-user activation by Day 30 reached 31 of 47 implementations this quarter.
body: 51 kickoffs listed 3-plus stakeholders at 64% versus the prior quarter's 39%. Multi-user activation by Day 30 reached 31 of 47 implementations this quarter.
trace: Stakeholder identification at kickoff correlates with broader user activation in the first month.
